heading: Simple, all-inclusive rates
subheading: All lessons include use of a pony, riding helmet, boots and tack. No hidden extras.

cards.name: 10-Lesson Term Block
cards.desc: Secures your child's place each school term. This is the recommended option — casual spots fill quickly.

cards.name: Casual Lesson
cards.desc: $45 for kids, $50 for adults. Always book ahead — we can't guarantee a spot on the day.

cards.name: Holiday Programme
cards.desc: School holiday fun days with riding, games and activities. Great for regular riders and newcomers alike.

cards.name: Birthday Party
cards.desc: An unforgettable party. Kids ride, play games on horseback and leave with big smiles.

cards.name: Overnight Camp
cards.desc: A two-day immersive horse experience. Riders care for ponies, camp out and ride — a proper adventure.

cards.name: Schools & Groups
cards.desc: Customised riding for schools and special interest groups. Get in touch to discuss your requirements.

note: * Prices current to January 2026 and may increase. Please enquire before booking.
ponies_note: Have a suitable pony for sale? Please contact us.
